completed_tasks.name: Update SOURCE_TABS to include all 8 contextual sources with i18n
Update groupResultsBySource and calculateCounts for all sources
Add missing i18n strings and update footer

decisions.decision: SOURCE_TABS_CONTEXTUAL has 9 entries (All + 8 sources) with label_key for i18n
decisions.rationale: All 8 contextual search sources need to be shown with localized labels

decisions.decision: navigateResults() and updateResultsSelection() provide unified keyboard navigation
decisions.rationale: Single function handles both command mode and search mode navigation

decisions.decision: Result items have ARIA role='option' and aria-selected for accessibility
decisions.rationale: Screen reader support for result navigation

next_action: Commit v1.6 changes and decide on next milestone (v1.7)
context_notes: v1.6 Context-Sensitive Search milestone is 100% complete. All 3 phases (25, 26, 27) and 7 plans executed. User was presented with options: (1) commit v1.6, (2) update roadmap, (3) start v1.7, or (4) review backlog. All 20 core features from FEATURE_PRIORITIES.md appear to be implemented.
